expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The top category navigation is clipped on the right side; the “Hot Games” tab is only partially visible, making the label unreadable.
Game tiles in the main sections are partially cut off on the right edge. If this is intended as a carousel, it lacks clear scroll affordance; otherwise it appears like horizontal overflow.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, causing cards at the bottom of the screen to be partially hidden behind the nav bar.
The hero carousel arrows sit very close to the screen edges, with the right arrow partially clipped by the viewport edge.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue specifically describes a broken casino icon in the bottom nav bar; the bottom nav overlap issue (report 2) is about content obstruction, not icon design/layout.
